review_title: A top tool to improve productivity
description: TimeTracker is used for logging in, planning projects, managing tasks, planning weekly and monthly calendars, tracking time and expenses, and more. The best part of using a time tracker is that it forces developers to stay on task by setting strict time limits. The developer's track record can be verified by the client. Both the client and the programmer can see through it without any difficulty
author: Denise W.
pros: Time Tracker is how I keep track of my schedule, tasks, and projects. Payroll and expenses can be calculated from the gleaned information. In addition, TimeTracker's customer service can fix any problems you're having.
cons: It works fine, although there are instances when there are bugs that force you to re-enter data. From what I've heard, the software's administrative interface can be perplexing, but I can't speak from personal experience.

review_title: A good solution to monitor / manage time
description: It is a fair and workable solution, but if the users keep complaining we will start looking for an alternative.
author: Federico A.
pros: A good time management tool for a small / medium company. It does have a mobile app, therefore we can do the job on the go. A great feature is that we can have multiple timers. Unsend and re-submit card is possible, allowing error correcting.
cons: Unfortunately, this tool is not so intuitive, so some users complain and request support even after training. Other users complain about the constant change in the UX. We have found some compatibility issues with Outlook and there is no CSV upload option.

review_title: Good Potential, Great Tech Support, Needs some kinks worked out
description: Greatly increased our efficiency and showed us what we really need in a time tracking software.
author: Joe P.
pros: Affordable way to track time for employees that are always on the go. Good integration with QB
cons: Frequent updates and login issues. Sometimes new customers don't pull in.

description: Basically for encrypted cloud PM, time, activity and expenses tracking. Online billing and invoicing features. Task and projects prioritisation.
author: Jesse D.
pros: Dependable and reliability on employees attendance time and activity tracking, adding due dates on tasks, online proofing and milestone projects management.
cons: Nothing at all on this great tool, I just crown it.

description: Overall it has been a good system for the office

cons: The log in process is a bit confusing to first set up but after your in the system there is no issues to report.

pros: Time tracker is an excellent product that fits my needs

review_title: Great way to track and manage time

cons: I was using a free trial, so think a free version would be great. Other than the cost, it is an excellent service!

description: Our main use of this software is to accurately track the time our consultants spend with clients. Instead of using a stopwatch, which would be highly unprofessional, or using an estimated time, which wouldn't be accurate, Time Tracker adds a layer of sophistication while keeping things simple.
author: Adam S.
pros: Some aspects of the business are simple and don't need overcomplicating. Time Tracker for us is just that; an easy solution to track time professionally (Not using a stopwatch). It also integrates the billing aspect as well. It links our payment processor to invoice our clients and sends the invoice to our accounting software. It is also valuable to have the ability to create an email follow-up sequence in case clients don't make the payment.
cons: Apart from the occasional late response from their customer service and the few glitches when entering the time, not much is inconvenient.

review_title: Time tracking can save you time
description: Great recommendation to all employers to try
author: Marcos U.
pros: It was easy to use and the work is all done for you
cons: The cost and the. Constant update it requires

description: Overall, it can be a useful tool for businesses and individuals looking to better manage their time, increase productivity, and improve project management. Also can provide accurate and detailed records of employee work hours, streamline invoicing processes, increase accountability, and offer mobile and remote access. However, implementing time tracker software can take time and effort, and the cost of using the software can vary widely depending on the features and functionality included. Additionally, some employees may be resistant to using time tracker software, and there is a risk of technical issues or data breaches. Ultimately, it's important to carefully consider the potential benefits and drawbacks of time tracker software before deciding whether or not to use it for your business or organization.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Improved time management, accurate time tracking, streamlined invoicing, increased accountability, remote and mobile access and integration with other business software
cons: Implementation time, cost (advanced features) , resistance from employees, technical issues, reliance on technology

description: I don't have to come up with my own method of tracking employee and contractor hours. Integration with Quickbooks now with the web client is seemless. Things pretty much work well now.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Multi-platform with ease of use. Flexibility to allow you to record multiple days and hours in a single line-item or (like me) track each individual day separately so that I can report to my customers exactly what was done when I was there billing hourly. No save button the stuff is automatically saved when you tab past and entry in the web client. Mobile clients for Android and iPhone are very functional.
cons: Screen handling is sometimes buggy. Every once in a while you end up with two lines per entry which typically happens on a larger screen. I have a 4K display and sometimes when I make the screen size large enough to fit the entire width of the screen the second line pops in which makes no sense. I would also like more flexibility in enlarging sections of the screen, and the ability to eliminate fields that I don't use, but that's just cosmetic things. The program works great. Andriod and iPhone clients don't capitalize the first word in a sentence for some reason even though it does that in other applications. This causes editing issues later for me when I bill the customer. I get statements from my workers like "i moved sue's computer" and typically if I dictate in other applications it comes out like "I moved Sue's computer" -- I'm not sure why they don't use the typical text processors on the platform

review_title: Look no futher than in Time Tracker!
description: Time tracker has been effective for me as I have been able to work on clients' projects easily. Billing and invoicing are very accurate and transparent.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I am able to manage my projects much better. I am able to know exactly how much time I need to do a project. It provides transparency between me and the client. I am able to bill my clients and get paid accurately. It has increased my profitability since am able to time myself and with good speed to finish more and more projects.
cons: Time tracker decreases employees' morale. Employees would feel they are being spied on.It can be expensive for an organization with many employees.A time tracker can take additional time and cost if not implemented properly.

description: Generally speaking, I have had an extraordinary involvement in Time Tracker. It's basic, and simple to learn. Adding new venture names and numbers is quick.
author: shadust A.
pros: Basic, simple to utilize. ... A far off passage time sheet from every worker that synchronizes effectively with Fast Books. It's straightforward and simple to utilize
cons: On occasion my entrances appear to supernaturally vanish from the depiction segment which can be disappointing on the off chance that I can't follow what I did on a specific day and time.

description: Overall, Time Tracker has been an excellent time tracking tool for me. Its ease of use and customizable features make it a great option for individuals and teams alike. While the free version is limited, the paid version offers great value for the price.
author: Sharmin A.
pros: Easy to Use: Time Tracker has a user-friendly interface that makes it easy to track time for multiple projects. The interface is simple and intuitive, with clear labels and options for customization.Mobile App: The Time Tracker mobile app is a great feature that allows me to track time on-the-go. It's available for both iOS and Android devices and provides all the same functionality as the desktop version.Customizable Reports: Time Tracker allows me to generate detailed reports based on the data I've tracked. These reports can be customized by date range, project, and even individual team members.Integrations: Time Tracker integrates with popular project management tools such as Asana, Trello, and Basecamp. This makes it easy to sync time tracking data with project management data.
cons: Limited Free Version: While Time Tracker does offer a free version, it is limited in functionality. The free version only allows for time tracking on one project and does not include the mobile app or detailed reporting.No Idle Time Detection: Time Tracker does not have an idle time detection feature, which means that if you forget to stop the timer when you take a break, it will continue tracking time.

author: Antoaneta Ioana C.
pros: I like that it is useful that any employee and his employer, his boss know how much time the employee works and how much time is needed for a project. It is show what are you doing with your time.
cons: There is nothing I don't like. There are specialists who develop and update softwares and I am sure that they will develop it with new methods to keep the employee or the team of employees focused on projects and the employer, the company, the institution, the turnover, the profit and the number of employees to form a successful business.

review_title: Very reliable, quick, easy to use, excellent way of keeping tabs on time and it use!

pros: Easy to see what time should be applied to what project, employee, job, expense, and at a glance.
cons: The auto tracker is great, but so many people forget to log off or turn it off when they go home!

description: It greatly helps in analyzing and developing work, thus raising productivity and coordination

description: A good and excellent experience for ease of Use and excellent time management to arrange my business and daily planning well
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use and handle, excellent time management and something important in a day

review_title: Time trackers are flexible and Increase Productivity
description: Additional Time trackers can also help with setting realistic objectives, finding productivity patterns, and honing time management techniques. They provide a data-driven method for figuring out where time is spent, which enables improved decision-making and workflow optimization
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Time trackers are flexible instruments for managing and keeping track of time allotment. They can be used for project management, teamwork, individual productivity, and even hourly charging of clients. The ultimate objective is to increase productivity and learn more about how people spend their time.
cons: Billing, project monitoring, and productivity management are three frequent uses for time trackers. It assists people or organizations in keeping track of and making the most use of the time spent on jobs, projects, or activities.

description: Overall this is a good software that companies can make use of to keep note of their employees working hours and to understand how to improve resource utilization into projects reaping more profits.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Time Tracker by Ebility is a software used by companies to keep track of the hours clocked in by their employees and to maintain resource allocation. This helps in easily understanding which employees are giving what number of hours, whether the hours spent are billable or non billable, which projects are utilizing which resources, etc. This is an easy to use tool and can also be integrated with Outlook. One of the best things is that a mobile application is also available for Time Tracker which can enable employees to record their hours using a phone.
cons: This is a very good tool for time tracking, but sometimes user find issues loading it and it may even crash sometimes. At times, the user's entered information is also not saved, so he/she ends up having to enter it all again.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Time Trackers works well with Reckon Hosted for real-time hours tracking
description: Time Tracker provides an easy way to create invoices based on actual time spent on the project. I can keep track of casual worker hours too.
author: Kate S.
pros: The software is easy to use. The fact that time can be tracked in real-time from the field, and not just when staff return to the office is very helpful for accurate time-keeping. The customer service offered is outstanding. We don't have many issues but if something happens, it is always fixed quickly and painlessly.
cons: There are no features I need that aren't available in this system.

review_title: Time keeping and Resource Management made easier with Time Tracker
author: Wangari N.
pros: Every business needs to keept tab of all your business operations from knowing employees productivity, the clients, projects making or costing the business more money. With Time Tracker we are able to track time irregadless our location and even if you are offline. The mobile app is handy to work from anywhere. The premium version is reasonably priced for all to afford. Its very easy to use with no to minimal training required. Keeping records with Time Tracker is accurate and helps our company know where and when to cut costs, knowing which employees requires help and training, which projects requires more time to complete among others.
cons: Time is money and when utilised well, you get reward for increased productivity and generally meeting your company’s goals. Time Tracker is what every business needs to suceed
